description: Runtime config for the QBO sync pipeline. Holds the Local/Import field name, cutoff date, and ToDo assignee. Single doctype.

fields.label: Staging Enabled
fields.description: Master switch for the on_submit hook. Off by default — turn on once filters are confirmed correct.

fields.label: Earliest Posting Date
fields.description: PIs with posting_date before this date are skipped entirely (never enter the queue).

fields.label: Import/Local Fieldname
fields.description: The fieldname on Purchase Invoice that holds Local vs Import classification.

fields.label: Local Value
fields.description: The exact value of the Import/Local field that means 'this PI should be pushed to QBO'. Anything else is skipped.

fields.label: Assignee User
fields.description: Who gets the ToDo sidebar items when queue rows or unapproved maps need attention.

fields.label: Runner Push Poll Interval (min)
fields.description: Informational. The external runner reads this to size its push-poll cron cadence.

name: QBO Sync Settings
